title: Celeste Roberts
compiled_truth: Celeste Roberts is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-05 to 2001-12-03), Celeste Roberts sent 12 and received 106 emails, totalling 118 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (9), [Charlene Jackson](people/charlene-jackson) (3), [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (2), [Althea Gordon](people/althea-gordon) (2), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (2).
